area.value: you one creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: Planar adaptation grants you immunity to the harmful environmental effects of a particular plane of existence, including such hazards as toxicity, extreme temperatures, and lack of air. Additionally, you gain energy resistance 20 to a single energy type prevalent on that plane (choose one if more than one type is equally prevalent). Planar adaptation has no effect when cast upon your native plane. Planar Adaptation, Mass This spell functions like planar adaptation, except as noted above.
